## Verses (12)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | God, you have put us away from you, you have sent us in all directions, you have been angry; O be turned to us again. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | By the power of your hand the earth is shaking and broken; make it strong again, for it is moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | You have made the people see hard times; you have given us the wine of shaking for our drink. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Give a safe place to those who have fear of you, where they may go in flight from before the bow. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | So that your loved ones may be made safe, let your right hand be my salvation, and give me an answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | God has said in his holy place, I will be glad: I will make a division of Shechem, and the valley of Succoth will be measured out. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine; and Ephraim is the strength of my head; Judah is my law-giver; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I put out my shoe; over Philistia will a glad cry be sounded. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Who will take me into the strong town? who will be my guide into Edom? | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Have not you put us away, O God? and you have not gone out with our armies. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Give us help in our trouble; for there is no help in man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Through God we will do great things, for through him our haters will be crushed under our feet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
